entities.name: Polyorchestrator
entities.context: A new knowledge worker type that translates between domains and orchestrates specialists rather than mastering each field

entities.name: Polymath
entities.context: Historical knowledge worker type who mastered multiple fields through deep expertise

entities.name: Cross-domain leverage
entities.context: Achieving leverage across domains through translation and coordination rather than deep expertise

entities.name: Epistemology
entities.context: The philosophical domain this model belongs to

relationships.context: Contrasting models - polyorchestrator achieves similar outcomes through coordination rather than mastery
Cross-domain leverage is the outcome achieved by the polyorchestrator approach
The polyorchestrator model belongs to the epistemology domain
